caption: A man with glasses and hair tied back performs while standing before a microphone in front of a backdrop of light-brown horizontal wooden slats. He wears a white collared shirt, a dark vest with decorative white floral embroidery, and a red-and-white beaded necklace. He holds a light-colored guitar, though only the top edge is visible. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. The back of a person's head is visible in the lower foreground. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, singing into the microphone. His facial expression and the position of his mouth shift slightly as he vocalizes, and his body sways marginally. The camera remains static, maintaining a consistent medium shot of the performer and the surrounding setting.
